calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court summarizes the previous calling of this matter and of the court's directive to attorney for Executor, Donald Chun, file an Amended Petition by Mar-11-2022 and that if the Amended Petition was not formally filed by the aforementioned deadline, the court would consider ordering sanctions of fifty ($50) dollars per day from Mar-11-2022, until the amended petition was filed.

Upon consideration, the court takes the sanctions off calendar and the Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Continued To Mar-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Chun, via ZOOM, for Douglass Macbeth, Executor.

Mr. Chun reports that he has addressed eight (8) of the eleven (11) items noted by the probate Examiner and an amended petition has been forwarded to his client for signature. Mr. Chun requests a two-week continuance to allow for filing of the amended petition. The court confirms with Mr. Chun that the accounting is from Settlor's date of death. The court reminds Mr. Chun that this matter has been delayed several times. The court agrees to continue the matter but advises Mr. Chun that the amended petition must be formally filed, not merely pending in the court's efiling queue, two-weeks prior to the next hearing date.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Mar-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Amended Petition must be formally filed, as described above, by Mar-11-2022. If the Petition is not formally filed by the aforementioned deadline, the court will consider ordering sanctions of fifty ($50) dollars per day from Mar-11-2022, until the amended petition is filed.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Continued To Feb-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Chun, via ZOOM, for Douglas Macbeth, Executor.

Mr. Chun reports that he has been dealing with some personal issues which have caused this matter to be delayed but that he just reviewed the Examiner's notes and plans on filing an amended petition to address one of the issues listed in the notes. Mr. Chun then requests clarification of Examiner's noted item C). The court advises Mr. Chun to contact the assigned Examiner for clarification.

The Accounting Petition is continued to Feb-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Dec-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Continued To Oct-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Chun, via ZOOM, for Douglas Macbeth, Administrator.

Mr. Chun begins by reporting to the court that he had previously submitted documents for electronic filing, but that they had been rejected. Counsel advises the court that notices, a waiver of accounting, and an accounting petition are in the electronic filing queue. The court confirms with counsel that a Final Inventory and Appraisal is expected to be filed with the court.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 4, 2021, at at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To Jun-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Chun appeared by zoom for Douglas MacBeth.

The Court noted that there are some items missing and asked Mr. Chun where things stand. Mr. Chun apologized to the Court stating that it has been a difficult year, that he is just about ready to file the inventory and suggested a 90-day continuance to file a petition for final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to June 23, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
